'''Kaloo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Roon system/Legends|Roon system]] within the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and had a terrain of searing rock.

{{Planet-stub}}
